# Vim keybinding reference

✅ implemented **161** · ❌ todo **1104** · ➕ ved extension **47** · ⬜ out of scope **3**

Status against Vim's own `index.txt`. `Key` is Vim notation; `API` is the
`@ved/vim` primitive (a motion/action id) or, for a todo, its intended surface.

## Editing

| Key | Mode | Action | API | Status |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `["x]C` | normal | change from the cursor position to the end | `change.toLineEnd` | ✅ |
| `["x]D` | normal | delete the characters under the cursor | `delete.toLineEnd` | ✅ |
| `["x]s` | normal | (substitute) delete N characters [into | `substitute.char` | ✅ |
| `["x]S` | normal | delete N lines [into register x] and start | `substitute.line` | ✅ |
| `["x]x` | normal | delete N characters under and after the | `delete.charForward` | ✅ |
| `["x]X` | normal | delete N characters before the cursor [into | `delete.charBack` | ✅ |
| `["x]Y` | normal | yank N lines [into register x]; synonym for | `yank.toLineEnd` | ✅ |
| `<` | visual | shift the highlighted lines one | `visual.dedent` | ✅ |
| `>` | visual | shift the highlighted lines one | `visual.indent` | ✅ |
| `~` | normal | 'tildeop' off: switch case of N characters | `case.toggle` | ✅ |
| `~` | visual | swap case for the highlighted area | `visual.toggleCase` | ✅ |
| `~{motion}` | normal | 'tildeop' on: switch case of Nmove text | `case.toggle` | ✅ |
| `A` | visual | block mode: append same text in all lines, | `visual.blockAppend` | ✅ |
| `c` | visual | delete highlighted area and start insert | `visual.change` | ✅ |
| `CTRL-A` | normal | add N to number at/after cursor | `increment.add` | ✅ |
| `CTRL-X` | normal | subtract N from number at/after cursor | `increment.sub` | ✅ |
| `d` | visual | delete highlighted area | `visual.delete` | ✅ |
| `gJ` | normal | join lines without inserting space | `gJ` | ✅ |
| `gJ` | visual | join the highlighted lines without | `gJ` | ✅ |
| `I` | visual | block mode: insert same text in all lines, | `visual.blockInsert` | ✅ |
| `J` | normal | Join N lines; default is 2 | `line.join` | ✅ |
| `J` | visual | join the highlighted lines | `visual.join` | ✅ |
| `o` | visual | move cursor to other corner of area | `visual.swapEnds` | ✅ |
| `O` | visual | move horizontally to other corner of area | `visual.swapCorners` | ✅ |
| `p` | visual | replace highlighted area with register | `visual.pasteOver` | ✅ |
| `P` | visual | replace highlighted area with register | `visual.pasteOver` | ✅ |
| `r` | visual | replace highlighted area with a character | `visual.replaceChar` | ✅ |
| `r{char}` | normal | replace N chars with {char} | `replace.char` | ✅ |
| `s` | visual | delete highlighted area and start insert | `visual.change` | ✅ |
| `u` | visual | make highlighted area lowercase | `visual.lowercase` | ✅ |
| `U` | visual | make highlighted area uppercase | `visual.uppercase` | ✅ |
| `v` | visual | make Visual mode charwise or stop | `visual.toggleChar` | ✅ |
| `V` | visual | make Visual mode linewise or stop Visual | `visual.toggleLine` | ✅ |
| `x` | visual | delete the highlighted area | `visual.delete` | ✅ |
| `y` | visual | yank the highlighted area | `visual.yank` | ✅ |
